mapper.insert: insert into orders (number, status, user_id, address_book_id, order_time, checkout_time, pay_method, pay_status, amount, remark, phone, address, user_name,cancel_reason, rejection_reason,cancel_time, consignee, estimated_delivery_time, delivery_status, delivery_time, pack_amount, tableware_number, tableware_status) values (#{number}, #{status}, #{userId}, #{addressBookId}, #{orderTime}, #{checkoutTime}, #{payMethod}, #{payStatus}, #{amount}, #{remark}, #{phone}, #{address}, #{userName},#{cancelReason}, #{rejectionReason},#{cancelTime}, #{consignee}, #{estimatedDeliveryTime}, #{deliveryStatus}, #{deliveryTime}, #{packAmount}, #{tablewareNumber}, #{tablewareStatus})
mapper.update:
update orders
status = #{status},
pay_status = #{payStatus},
checkout_time = #{checkoutTime},
where id = #{id}
